purpose: Copies the freshly built Markdown++ plugin package (build\cmake\vs2026-x64\package\<Config>\MarkdownPlusPlus) into the Notepad++ plugins folder (auto-detected via $env:ProgramFiles\Notepad++\plugins, falling back to ${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}\Notepad++\plugins, or -PluginsRoot override). Refuses to run if notepad++.exe is running (unless -Force). Deletes the existing MarkdownPlusPlus subfolder contents before copying so stale files are not left behind.
invariants: Target folder is wiped before copy: 'Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $targetDir -Force | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force' - so any out-of-band files placed there manually are lost on every install.
Throws if the package folder is missing (the user has not built with -Package yet) and throws if Notepad++ is running without -Force.
gotchas: Resolve-PluginsRoot returns the FIRST candidate path even if Test-Path is false for all of them (final fallback: $candidates[0]) - so on a machine where neither ProgramFiles nor ProgramFiles(x86) has Notepad++\plugins, the script will try to copy into a non-existent ProgramFiles path and fail late.
Detection relies on the process being named exactly 'notepad++' (without .exe); portable Notepad++ launchers that rename the executable can sneak past the safety check.
